MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. Appearances: Rafal Ofierski of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4244) for defendant and moving party. No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
